_comment: Built-in terrestrial creature. Defines the TERRESTRIAL archetype base: other terrestrial species ride this cfg/breeding. Visuals/model are built-in. cfg = hitbox + hop/wade physics; breeding overrides the shared breeding._default in world.js. (Predator state-machine + diet tuning live in world.js predator block / the DIETS table.) Predation is a coin-flip on contact: when within cfg.contactRadius of prey, roll [0,1) — a roll > winThreshold kills the prey (predator feeds), otherwise the prey escapes.
name: Frog
